SEARCH
Package org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer

Interface Model<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type representing the state space of the problem
All Known Subinterfaces:
AcsModel<T>, DdoModel<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
GRModel, KSModel, MispModel, TSPModel, TSPTWModel
public interface Model<T>
Defines the core model interface for describing an optimization problem in the NoLayer API.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default DebugLevel
    debugMode()
    Returns the debugging level.
    default NoLayerDominanceChecker<T>
    dominance()
    Returns the dominance checker used to prune dominated states.
    default FastLowerBound<T>
    lowerBound()
    Returns a heuristic that estimates a lower bound on the objective value for a given state.
    Problem<T>
    problem()
    Returns the optimization problem instance associated with this model.
    default double
    upperBound()
    Returns a precomputed upper bound on the optimal value.
    default VerbosityLevel
    verbosityLevel()
    Returns the verbosity level of the solver when this model is executed.

  • Method Details

    • problem

      Problem<T> problem()
      Returns the optimization problem instance associated with this model.
      Returns:
      the Problem defining the structure, transitions, and objective function

    • lowerBound

      default FastLowerBound<T> lowerBound()
      Returns a heuristic that estimates a lower bound on the objective value for a given state.
      Returns:
      the FastLowerBound heuristic

    • upperBound

      default double upperBound()
      Returns a precomputed upper bound on the optimal value.
      Returns:
      a precomputed upper bound on the optimal value

    • dominance

      default NoLayerDominanceChecker<T> dominance()
      Returns the dominance checker used to prune dominated states.
      Returns:
      the NoLayerDominanceChecker used for dominance testing

    • verbosityLevel

      default VerbosityLevel verbosityLevel()
      Returns the verbosity level of the solver when this model is executed.
      Returns:
      the desired VerbosityLevel

    • debugMode

      default DebugLevel debugMode()
      Returns the debugging level.
      Returns:
      the DebugLevel controlling debug behavior
